name: Enchiladas Verdes - Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the tortillas in fat until softened.
2. Heat the garlic in oil and discard the garlic.
3. Blend the flour into the oil.
4. Stir in the green chili sauce and heat thoroughly.
5. If the mixture is too thick, add water.
6. Add salt to taste.
7. Layer tortillas with sauce, minced onion, and cheese on oven-proof plates.
8. Sprinkle cheese on top.
9. Use 3 tortillas for each serving.
10. Place in the oven to allow the cheese to melt.
NOTE: For a real New Mexican touch, place a poached or fried egg on top. The egg seems to help meld the flavors.
